tagged_types.name: Button
tagged_types.code: type Button is new Frame with private;

tagged_types.name: CheckButton
tagged_types.code: type CheckButton is new Button with private;

tagged_types.name: EntryWidget
tagged_types.code: type EntryWidget is new Frame with private;

tagged_types.name: Frame
tagged_types.code: type Frame is new Widget with private;

tagged_types.name: Label
tagged_types.code: type Label is new Frame with private;

tagged_types.name: Message
tagged_types.code: type Message is new Frame with private;

tagged_types.name: RadioButton
tagged_types.code: type RadioButton is new Button with private;

tagged_types.name: Toplevel
tagged_types.code: type Toplevel is new Frame with private;

tagged_types.name: Widget
tagged_types.code: type Widget is abstract tagged private;

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : String; Right : Widget'Class) return String

documentation.description:
Concatenates and returns the string names of Left and Right.
Does not insert the separating dot.

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Widget'Class; Right : String) return String

documentation.description:
Concatenates and returns the string names of Left and Right.
Does not insert the separating dot.

subprograms.code:
function "&"
  (Left  : Widget'Class;
   Right : Widget'Class)
   return  String

documentation.description:
Concatenates and returns the string names of Left and Right.
Does not insert the separating dot.

subprograms.name: After
subprograms.code: function After (Ms : Natural; Script : String) return String

documentation.description:
Arranges for the Tcl Script to be executed after Ms milliseconds
in the "contextual" interpreter.  The function returns an
identifier suitable for canceling the command.

subprograms.name: After

documentation.description:
Arranges for the Tcl Script to be executed after Ms milliseconds
in the specified interpreter.  The function returns an
identifier suitable for canceling the command.

subprograms.name: After
subprograms.code: procedure After (Ms : Natural)

documentation.description: Sleeps for Ms milliseconds in the "contextual" interpreter.

subprograms.name: After
subprograms.code: procedure After (Ms : Natural; Script : String)

documentation.description:
Arranges for the Tcl Script to be executed after Ms milliseconds
in the "contextual" interpreter.  The function returns an
identifier suitable for canceling the command.

subprograms.name: After
subprograms.code: procedure After (Interp : Tcl_Interp; Ms : Natural)

documentation.description: Sleeps for Ms milliseconds in the specified interpreter.

subprograms.name: After

documentation.description:
Arranges for the Tcl Script to be executed after Ms milliseconds
in the specified interpreter.  The function returns an
identifier suitable for canceling the command.

subprograms.name: Cancel
subprograms.code: procedure Cancel (id_or_script : String)

documentation.description:
Cancels the execution of a delayed command in the "contextual"
interpreter.

subprograms.code: procedure Cancel (Interp : Tcl_Interp; id_or_script : String)

documentation.description:
Cancels the execution of a delayed command in the specified
interpreter.

subprograms.name: cget

function cget
  (Widgt  : Widget'Class;
   option : String)

documentation.description: Returns the current value of the specified configuration option.

subprograms.name: configure
subprograms.code:
function configure
  (Widgt   : Widget'Class;
   options : String := "")
   return    String

documentation.description:
Queries or modifies the configuration options.  If options is
an empty string, returns a list of all available options
for the widget.

subprograms.name: configure
subprograms.code: procedure configure (Widgt : Widget'Class; options : String := "")

documentation.description:
Queries or modifies the configuration options.  If options is
an empty string, returns a list of all available options
for the widget.

an identifier suitable for canceling the command.

an identifier suitable for canceling the command.

subprograms.name: Pack
subprograms.code: procedure Pack (Slave : Widget'Class; Options : String)

documentation.description: Tells the packer how to configure the specified Slave window.

subprograms.code: procedure Pack_Configure (Slave : Widget'Class; Options : String)

documentation.description: Tells the packer how to configure the specified Slave window.

subprograms.name: Pack_Forget
subprograms.code: procedure Pack_Forget (Slave : Widget'Class)

documentation.description:
Removes the Slave window from the packing list for its master
and unmaps their windows.

subprograms.name: Pack_Info
subprograms.code: function Pack_Info (Slave : Widget'Class) return String

documentation.description:
Returns a list whose elements are the current configuration
state of the specified Slave window.

subprograms.name: Pack_Propagate

documentation.description: Returns state of propagation in the specified Master window.

documentation.description: Enables or disables propagation for the specified Master window.

subprograms.name: Pack_Slaves
subprograms.code: function Pack_Slaves (Master : Widget'Class) return String

documentation.description:
Returns a list of slaves in the packing order of the specified
Master window.
